commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=aaa5b62c758422da01c70f7df2c0d9cec4d0bf5e)
commands.review_summary:
The branch changes the gateway run loop so forced restarts use a 5s drain budget and updates run-loop tests to expect active-work waits plus a 5s close drain timeout.

PR surface: Source +23, Tests 0. Total +23 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main and `v2026.6.10` return 0ms for forced restarts, skip active-work waits, and server close treats a 0ms reply drain as immediately undrained. I did not run a live forced restart in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed for real-behavior proof and maintainer acceptance of the bounded forced-restart compatibility tradeoff; there is no safe automated repair lane for that decision.

target.title: fix(gateway): preserve pending replies on forced restart
target.author: xzh-icenter
